title: lepechinia schiedeana
intro: Lepechinia schiedeana, also known as Hierba del Perro or Mexican Coyote Mint, is a type of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae) that is native to Mexico and Central America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Lepechinia schiedeana include reducing fever, relieving headaches and joint pain, and supporting digestive health, among others. Lepechinia schiedeana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and enjoy its health benefits.
